evaluations.prompt: What courses should I take in my first year of engineering?
evaluations.response: For your first year of engineering, I recommend focusing on core subjects: Mathematics (Calculus I & II), Physics, Introduction to Programming, Engineering Drawing, and English Communication. These build the foundation for all specializations. Would you like details on any specific branch?

evaluations.prompt: What is the application deadline for the 2025 batch?
evaluations.response: The application deadline for the 2025 batch is March 31, 2025 for early admissions and May 15, 2025 for regular admissions. Late applications may be considered on a case-by-case basis subject to seat availability.

evaluations.prompt: How much is the tuition fee for the MBA program?
evaluations.response: The MBA program tuition fee is ₹4,50,000 per annum. This includes library access, lab facilities, and student association fees. Scholarships are available for meritorious students covering up to 50% of the tuition. Payment can be made in two installments per semester.

evaluations.prompt: Can I transfer credits from my previous college?
evaluations.response: Yes, credit transfers are possible under our Credit Transfer Policy. You will need to submit official transcripts, course syllabi, and a credit transfer request form. The academic committee reviews each case individually. Generally, up to 30% of total credits can be transferred. Please visit the registrar's office for more details.

evaluations.prompt: What documents are required for admission?
evaluations.response: Required documents for admission include: 10th and 12th mark sheets, Transfer Certificate, Migration Certificate, Character Certificate, Passport-size photographs (6), Aadhaar card copy, Category certificate (if applicable), and Entrance exam scorecard. All documents must be submitted in original along with 2 sets of self-attested photocopies.
